subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-04-21
subcodes.first_line: Look at these white lilies - how fragrant and pure they are! An emblem of the spotless heart... Praise be to God that we are enjoying the benefits of the material and spiritual Ridvan... The message of Ridvan is love, love and still more love
subcodes.subjects: @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @symbolism, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
